summary: Frontend-only testing of Yashashree Rathi Creator Media Kit static React landing page. Verified mobile responsiveness across 4 viewports, hamburger drawer flow, header/tier/nav CTAs scroll behaviour, count-up stat values, and contact link hrefs. All requested checks passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean. Header drawer uses body-overflow lock with cleanup. Smooth-scroll uses native scrollIntoView. Mailto verified via attribute (correctly NOT clicked since Playwright cannot follow external mail clients). No backend exists — consistent with static page requirements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single-page static React app at https://she-creates-1.preview.emergentagent.com. No /api endpoints. All data-testids in place: site-header, nav-*, mnav-*, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-drawer, header-cta, contact-email/instagram/newsletter, total-reach-value, stat-{instagram|linkedin|youtube|newsletter}-value, tier-cta-{seed|growth|trust}. Count-up animation completes ~1.8s after Hero enters viewport — wait ~2.5s before reading values.
